title: CT2 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

transitions.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    {capability : CT2.Capability P Target} →
      {ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target} →
        {input : CT2.Input capability ctx} →
          CT2.Graph.Edge capability ctx input CT2.Graph.NodeId.entry CT2.Graph.NodeId.deletionDecision

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    {capability : CT2.Capability P Target} →
      {ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target} →
        {input : CT2.Input capability ctx} →
          CT2.DeletionWitness capability ctx input →
            CT2.Graph.Edge capability ctx input CT2.Graph.NodeId.deletionDecision CT2.Graph.NodeId.deletionC2Terminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    {capability : CT2.Capability P Target} →
      {ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target} →
        {input : CT2.Input capability ctx} →
          CT2.DeletionCriticalState capability ctx input →
            CT2.Graph.Edge capability ctx input CT2.Graph.NodeId.deletionDecision CT2.Graph.NodeId.replacementAnalysis

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    {capability : CT2.Capability P Target} →
      {ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target} →
        {input : CT2.Input capability ctx} →
          CT2.ReplacementWitness capability ctx input →
            CT2.Graph.Edge capability ctx input CT2.Graph.NodeId.replacementAnalysis
              CT2.Graph.NodeId.replacementC2Terminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    {capability : CT2.Capability P Target} →
      {ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target} →
        {input : CT2.Input capability ctx} →
          CT2.SeparatingContextResidual capability ctx input →
            CT2.Graph.Edge capability ctx input CT2.Graph.NodeId.replacementAnalysis CT2.Graph.NodeId.separatingTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    {capability : CT2.Capability P Target} →
      {ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target} →
        {input : CT2.Input capability ctx} →
          CT2.CriticalityResidual capability ctx input →
            CT2.Graph.Edge capability ctx input CT2.Graph.NodeId.replacementAnalysis
              CT2.Graph.NodeId.criticalityTerminal

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.Graph.NodeId

apiDeclarations.type: CT2.Graph.NodeId → String
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.Graph.NodeId.code

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    (capability : CT2.Capability P Target) →
      (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) →
        CT2.Input capability ctx → CT2.Graph.NodeId → CT2.Graph.NodeId → Type (max uCandidate uContext)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.Graph.Edge

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.Graph.Terminal

apiDeclarations.type: CT2.Graph.Terminal → CT2.Graph.NodeId
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.Graph.Terminal.nodeId

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    (capability : CT2.Capability P Target) →
      (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) →
        CT2.Input capability ctx → CT2.Graph.NodeId → CT2.Graph.NodeId → Type (max uCandidate uContext)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.Graph.Path

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    (capability : CT2.Capability P Target) →
      (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) → CT2.Input capability ctx → List CT2.Graph.NodeId → Prop
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.Graph.ValidTrace

apiDeclarations.type:
(P : Core.Problem) →
  (P.Ambient → Prop) →
    Type
      (max
          (max (max (max (max (max (uAbstract + 1) uAmbient) uBranch) (uCandidate + 1)) (uContext + 1))
              (uInterface + 1))
          (uPiece + 1))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.Capability

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} → CT2.Capability P Target → Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target → Type uPiece
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.Input

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    (capability : CT2.Capability P Target) →
      (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) → CT2.Input capability ctx → Type (max uCandidate uContext)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.ExecutionResult

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    (capability : CT2.Capability P Target) →
      (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) →
        CT2.Input capability ctx → CT2.Graph.Terminal → Type (max uCandidate uContext)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.RawOutcome

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    (capability : CT2.Capability P Target) →
      (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) →
        (input : CT2.Input capability ctx) → CT2.ExecutionResult capability ctx input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.run

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    (capability : CT2.Capability P Target) →
      (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) →
        (input : CT2.Input capability ctx) → CT2.ExecutionResult capability ctx input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.runReference

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} (capability : CT2.Capability P Target)
  (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) (input : CT2.Input capability ctx),
  CT2.RawOutcome.Valid capability ctx input (CT2.run capability ctx input).outcome
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.run_verified

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} (capability : CT2.Capability P Target)
  (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) (input : CT2.Input capability ctx),
  CT2.Graph.ValidTrace capability ctx input
    (CT2.ExecutionResult.trace capability ctx input (CT2.run capability ctx input))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} (capability : CT2.Capability P Target)
  (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) (input : CT2.Input capability ctx),
  ∃ result,
    CT2.RawOutcome.Valid capability ctx input result.outcome ∧
      CT2.Graph.ValidTrace capability ctx input (CT2.ExecutionResult.trace capability ctx input result)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} (capability : CT2.Capability P Target)
  (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) (input : CT2.Input capability ctx)
  (left right : CT2.ExecutionResult capability ctx input),
  left = CT2.run capability ctx input → right = CT2.run capability ctx input → left = right
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {Target : P.Ambient → Prop} (capability : CT2.Capability P Target)
  (ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext P Target) (input : CT2.Input capability ctx)
  (result : CT2.ExecutionResult capability ctx input),
  result.terminal = CT2.Graph.Terminal.deletionC2 ∨
    result.terminal = CT2.Graph.Terminal.replacementC2 ∨
      result.terminal = CT2.Graph.Terminal.separating ∨ result.terminal = CT2.Graph.Terminal.criticality
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.outcome_exhaustive

apiDeclarations.type: Core.CapabilityContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.capabilityContract

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.NodeAutomationContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.nodeAutomationContracts

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.ResidualKindContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT2.residualKindContracts
